tasks.subject: Task 1: useSudo + SudoModal

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/lib/sudo.ts","dashboard/src/components/SudoModal.vue","dashboard/src/lib/sudo.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/lib/sudo.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["withSudo passthrough","retry once after step-up","rethrow on cancel","ignore non-sudo errors"]}
```
